M1700_COG_FUNCTION M1700 (M0560) Cognitive Functioning This field indicates the patient's current level of cognitive functioning. 00 = Alert/oriented, able to focus and shift attention, comprehends and recalls task directions independently.
01 = Requires prompting (cuing, repetition, reminders) only under stressful or unfamiliar conditions.
02 = Requires assistance and some direction in specific situations (e.g., on all tasks involving shifting of
